body:
At the moment we implement our vision partially.

Please use all previous issues, pull requests and comments to them, as well as requirements and other files describing our vision.

First make sure we update our documentation to fully track the progress of implementation of all the requirements.

After the initial documentation is updated, and everything in docs is in sync with actual state of the code please create all the issues that needs to be fully implemented, to fully implement our vision, as we should allow our system to learn the universal problem solving algorithm by making it possible to truly solve translation between languages (natural and formal), to have minimum core of algorithms and data seed, that will have enough metadata about that data to actually be able to problem solve any problem like people do, and what in similar way how it is expected from the AI, but without using neural networks for reasoning itself. We need formal reasoning implementation that will cover all the test cases we have and much more.

The ideal scenario is to teach our formal AI system general problem solving and coding skills algorithmically, so it should be opposite to neural networks approach that just learn on lots of data, and memoize it. Instead we should learn how to work with unknowns, and gather missing information ourselves, ask this information the user (yet try to ask as few questions as possible, as we should learn how to answer our questions ourselves, yet it always there be questions about task and requirements, that will not be possible to answer ourselves, only user can know what he actually wants giving the intermediate results or real world limitations, that were proven with high confidence).

As the result I need to have issues created in this repository to represent the full plan to make it actually happen.

We need to build up on our previous experience, make our algorithm more general, smart, and yet support everything we supported already, but in smarter way, so we support much and much more.

If you see any critical problems in our code, that blocks our vision from execution, we should plan to fix them first, so we build up on solid foundation.

We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).
title: Plan issues to implement our vision fully
